lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute showroom condition! This car has been meticulously cared for and looks as though it just rolled off the assembly line. From the flawless paintwork to the pristine interior, every detail is perfect. It's a rare find for a discerning buyer looking for a car in truly mint condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or chips, and the interior is spotless, showing absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a smooth engine, seamless transmission, and all electronic features functioning like new. It has been garage-kept and comes with a full service history, offering a rare opportunity for a buyer seeking a vehicle in near-perfect state.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches, and the interior shows light wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though the vehicle shows its age with some minor fluid seeps and a suspension that feels a bit loose over bumps. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a few small door dings, and some fading on the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows visible wear and staining in the footwells. All major electronics work, including the AC and radio, though the driver-side window motor is slower than the others. It’s a solid, honest car that gets the job done but isn't a showpiece.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable showroom standard. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to preservation, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly mint condition, offering the discerning driver a level of refinement and mechanical integrity that is second to none. Meticulously inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! 🚗✨ I've absolutely babied this car, keeping it tucked away in a climate-controlled garage and making sure it's always spotless. It runs like a dream and looks even better in person. I have all the maintenance records ready for you to check out too! I’m so excited for someone else to finally get to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out, I'd love to show it

Available is an impeccably preserved E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This example features the S54 3.2L inline-six, boasting individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that has been fully overhauled for optimal timing precision. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring tactile feedback and mechanical grip. Structural integrity is prioritized with a reinforced rear subframe and fresh bushings throughout the suspension geometry. The factory finish exhibits flawless depth and clarity, while the cabin retains its original tactile switchgear and bolster integrity. Mechanically synchronized and cosmetically flawless, this is a collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections, rock chips, or swirls. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing, while the carpets and trim show no signs of use. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did when it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just left the showroom floor. Complete with original window sticker, all

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising quality. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its showroom-original integrity both mechanically and aesthetically. Every surface reflects meticulous care, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of this model. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its exceptional state.

We are pleased to present this meticulously curated vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This unit represents an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail reflects the highest tier of aesthetic and mechanical integrity, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a vehicle of investment-grade quality.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in stunning, like-new condition from day one. It drives like a dream and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a museum-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. Mechanically flawless, it has undergone a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a preventative Rod Bearing and Double-VANOS overhaul.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Service records complete. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of a collector-quality find, preserved in a state that rivals its original delivery day. The exterior is finished in a flawless deep metallic paint that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating, showing absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing on the bolsters, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the multi-zone climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships, and a comprehensive folder of maintenance records is included to prove its fastidious upkeep. The engine bay is spotless, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the undercarriage is free of any corrosion or road wear. It sits on a fresh set of top-tier performance tires mounted on curb-rash-free alloy wheels. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a like-new driving experience without the new-car wait times.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a legacy of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. This is not merely a pre-owned vehicle; it is a testament to automotive excellence, offered in peerless condition for its next distinguished owner.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, offering showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. Discerning buyers will appreciate the uncompromising preservation of every detail, from the pristine interior to the immaculate exterior finish. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty in person! It’s in total mint condition and has been pampered since day one—honestly, it still feels brand new. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. I'm sad to see it go, but I know you're going to love it as much as I do!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six powerplant with high-revving individual throttle bodies. The chassis is structurally immaculate, with documented subframe reinforcement and a professionally overhauled VANOS system to ensure precise variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag six-speed manual gearbox and a variable M-differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Fully serviced. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark, scratch, or stone chip, complemented by pristine alloy wheels and factory-fresh trim. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple with no creases, the carpets are spotless, and the 'new car' scent persists. Every electronic feature, from the premium sound system to the advanced navigation, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete and documented service history performed exclusively by authorized technicians. It delivers a smooth, powerful, and silent driving experience that mirrors its first day on the road. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a top-tier example that has been pampered with no expense spared. Non-smoker, no accidents, and includes all original manuals and keys.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, preserved in an immaculate state that defies its tenure. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail remains in showroom-fresh condition, reflecting a history of uncompromising stewardship. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that is indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this automobile represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and provenance.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. I've taken such incredible care of it that it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! It drives like an absolute dream and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as pampered. Seriously, it's in flawless shape—you've gotta see it to believe it!

Exemplary 1994 Toyota Supra Turbo featuring the legendary 2JZ-GTE power plant. This unit remains in factory-spec configuration with the sequential twin-turbocharger system delivering linear power across the RPM band. The Getrag V160 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement with perfect synchros, feeding power through the original Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is absolute, maintaining factory double-wishbone suspension geometry. Recent leak-down and compression tests confirm internal health within OEM tolerances. A true collector-grade specimen with zero drivetrain modifications and a pristine undercarriage.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service records included.

This vehicle is a true collector’s gem, maintained in absolute showroom condition since the day it was driven off the lot. The exterior boasts a flawless factory paint job, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that gives it a deep, liquid-like shine. Every panel is perfectly aligned, free of any chips, dings, or scratches. Step inside to an interior that still carries that 'new car' scent; the hand-stitched leather upholstery is supple and shows zero signs of wear, while the dashboard and trim remain pristine. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly garage-kept and followed a rigorous maintenance schedule with full documentation provided. From the smooth, responsive engine to the crisp shift of the transmission, it drives exactly as it did on day one. Equipped with premium features including a high-fidelity sound system, advanced safety suite, and panoramic sunroof, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been loved and preserved with obsessive attention to detail.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no detectable wear or aesthetic compromise. Every component, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade asset that performs with the precision of a new machine, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.
